main_heading: What Does Balding on Top Mean?

haircuts.name: Crew Cut
haircuts.image_alt: Crew cut with short top and tight sides, clean shape that reduces the look of thinning hair.
haircuts.description: The Crew Cut keeps the hair short on top and even shorter on the sides, which helps make thinning spots less noticeable. The simple shape gives the head a clean, strong look. Blow-dry the top forward to add a little height, then use a small amount ofTexture Clayto give the hair light hold and a natural, dusty texture. This style is easy to manage and looks fresh every day.

haircuts.name: Textured Fringe
haircuts.image_alt: Textured fringe haircut with choppy bangs and faded sides, helping cover thinning hairline.
haircuts.description: The Textured Fringe is a great choice for balding men because the short, choppy bangs help cover thinning areas while adding a youthful look. The top is cut in uneven layers to create natural movement, and the sides are faded to keep the style clean and sharp. Blow-dry the front forward, then shape it with a small amount of Texture Clay to give the fringe lift, grip, and a soft matte finish.

haircuts.name: Ivy League
haircuts.image_alt: Ivy League haircut with short sides and slightly longer top, neat style that adds soft volume.
haircuts.description: The Ivy League gives balding men a clean, stylish look by keeping the sides short while leaving a slightly longer top that adds soft height and shape. The top is trimmed neatly so it blends well with thinning areas, creating a fuller appearance. Blow-dry the front upward for light lift, then finish with a small amount ofMolding Pasteto add texture, control, and a natural matte look.

haircuts.name: Messy Crop Top
haircuts.image_alt: Messy crop top haircut with rough texture and short sides, giving thinning hair a fuller look.
haircuts.description: The Messy Crop Top is a great hairstyle for balding men because the sides are cut very short while the top is left longer with rough, choppy texture. The short, uneven fringe helps make the hairline look softer and less noticeable. Blow-dry the top forward, shape it with your fingers, and use a little Texture Powder to add light volume and a natural messy look.

haircuts.name: Side Part
haircuts.image_alt: Side part haircut with short sides and guided top, creating balance and a fuller appearance.
haircuts.description: The Side Part is a clean and balanced style that works well for balding men because the part line helps guide the eye and creates a fuller look on top. The hair is cut short on the sides with a little more length across the crown for soft movement. Blow-dry the top toward the part, shape it with your fingers, and finish with Molding Paste for light hold and a natural finish.

haircuts.name: Textured Crop
haircuts.image_alt: Textured crop haircut with uneven fringe and faded sides, designed to hide thinning areas.
haircuts.description: The Textured Crop is a great choice for balding men because the short, messy top helps hide thin areas while giving the hair a fuller look. The fringe is cut low and uneven to add movement and draw attention forward. Blow-dry the top for lift, shape it with your fingers, and finish with Texture Powder to create light volume and a natural, textured finish.

haircuts.name: Caesar Cut
haircuts.image_alt: Caesar cut with short even length and straight fringe, helping soften a receding hairline.
haircuts.description: The Caesar Cut is a good option for balding men because the short, even top makes thin areas less noticeable. The small, straight fringe helps cover the hairline and gives the style a neat look. After a quick blow-dry, you can shape the top with your fingers. Finish with Molding Paste to add light texture and keep the hair in place without making it look heavy.

haircuts.name: Tapered Haircut
haircuts.image_alt: Tapered haircut with gradual fade and light texture on top, making thin hair less noticeable.
haircuts.description: The Tapered Haircut gives balding men a stylish look by keeping the sides short while leaving a little more length on top for soft texture. The gradual fade blends smoothly into the longer top, helping thin areas look less noticeable. Blow-dry the hair forward for light movement, then shape it with your fingers. A small amount ofMolding Pasteadds control and a natural finish without weighing the hair down.

haircuts.name: Side Swept Fringe
haircuts.image_alt: Side swept fringe haircut with angled bangs and short sides, adding coverage and movement.
haircuts.description: A Side Swept Fringe is a great choice for balding men because the angled fringe adds texture and gently covers thinner areas. This style brings attention to the fuller parts of your hair and gives a younger look. Blow-dry the fringe to one side for natural lift, then use Molding Paste to shape the layers and keep the style in place without making it feel heavy.

haircuts.name: Spiky Haircut
haircuts.image_alt: Spiky haircut with lifted textured top and short sides, drawing attention away from thin spots.
haircuts.description: A Spiky Haircut works well for balding men because the lifted spikes add texture and pull attention away from thinner spots. The sides stay short, while the top is a little longer to create a sharp look. Blow-dry the hair upward for quick volume, then use Texture Powder to add lift and shape the spikes easily with your fingers without making the hair heavy.

haircuts.name: French Crop
haircuts.image_alt: French crop haircut with short fringe and tight sides, clean style that reduces hairline focus.
haircuts.description: A French Crop is a great choice for balding men because the short, straight fringe helps cover the front hairline while keeping the look clean and modern. The sides are clipped tight, and the top is kept short to create a simple shape that’s easy to style. Blow-dry the fringe forward, then use Styling Cream to add light texture and keep the hair looking natural and neat.

haircuts.name: Quiff Haircut
haircuts.image_alt: Quiff haircut with lifted front and faded sides, adding height to disguise thinning hair.
haircuts.description: A Quiff Haircut is a great choice for balding men because the lifted front adds height and makes thinning areas look less noticeable. The short faded sides keep the haircut neat, while the longer top creates a strong shape. Blow-dry the front upward for volume, then use Texture Clay to shape the quiff and hold it in place while keeping the hair natural and flexible.

haircuts.name: High and Tight Haircut
haircuts.image_alt: High and tight haircut with ultra-short sides and neat top, sharp look for thinning hair.
haircuts.description: The High and Tight Haircut is a sharp, low-maintenance style that works well for balding men by keeping the sides extremely short and leaving a neat, slightly longer strip of hair on top. This clean shape draws attention upward and creates a fresher look. Blow-dry the top for a bit of lift, then lightly shape it with your fingers. A small amount of Molding Paste adds soft texture without making the hair look heavy.

haircuts.name: Short Curly Cut
haircuts.image_alt: Short curly haircut with natural texture on top, creating volume and reducing scalp visibility.
haircuts.description: The Short Curly Cut keeps the hair trimmed close while letting your natural curls add soft texture on top. This helps reduce attention on thinning areas and gives the style a fuller look. The curls sit lightly over the forehead, adding shape and movement. After a quick blow-dry, use a small amount of Styling Cream to define the curls and keep them looking natural without weighing them down.

haircuts.name: Side Swept
haircuts.image_alt: Side swept haircut with longer top brushed sideways, making thinning areas look fuller.
haircuts.description: The Side Swept gives balding men a stylish look by brushing the longer top hair gently to one side. This creates soft movement and helps the hair look thicker across the front. The shorter sides keep everything neat, while the angled fringe adds shape. Blow-dry the top upward and over, then use a small amount of Molding Paste to hold the style in place without making it look stiff.

haircuts.name: Business Cut
haircuts.image_alt: Business cut with short sides and neat top, professional style that adds clean structure.
haircuts.description: The Business Cut gives balding men a neat, professional look with short, clean sides and a longer top brushed smoothly back and to the side. This shape adds height and makes the hairline look fuller. The top has light texture for natural movement, while the fade keeps everything sharp. Blow-dry the hair upward, then useStyling Creamto create a soft, controlled finish that lasts all day.

haircuts.name: Scissor Cut
haircuts.image_alt: Scissor cut with soft layered top and natural flow, helping thin hair appear fuller.
haircuts.description: The Scissor Cut is a great choice for balding men because it keeps the hair looking natural, full, and soft. The top is shaped with loose, uneven layers that add movement and help cover thin spots, while the sides stay short for a clean look. Blow-dry the hair forward for lift, then use Texture Clay to create light separation and a relaxed, youthful finish that stays in place.
